stemHtml: The Alert phase is defined as when…

options.a: information is received that the fuel on board is exhausted and that the aircraft is about to make a forced landing.
options.b: there is a state of emergency in which an aircraft and its occupants are considered to be threatened by a danger.
options.c: an aircraft and its occupants are considered to be in a state of emergency.
options.d: apprehension exists as to the safety of an aircraft and its occupants.
